mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_resources WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM learning_resources WHERE uploader_id = #{uploaderId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM learning_resources WHERE uploader_role = #{uploaderRole} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_resources WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND ( (#{query} IS NULL OR #{query} = '') OR (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%')) )
